title: Lipid Biomarker Extraction
author: Lucia Leierer
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.yg2ftye

steps.title: Oven drying of sediment samples at...
steps.instruction: Oven drying of sediment samples at 60 °C during 48:00:00 and subsampling to 5 g of homogenized sediment

steps.title: Add 40 mL dichloromethane/methanol (DCM/MeOH) 9:1 v/v to the sediment
steps.instruction: Add 40 mL dichloromethane/methanol (DCM/MeOH) 9:1 v/v to the sediment

steps.title: Mix for 00:30:00 in a sonicator (below 30 °C )
steps.instruction: Mix for 00:30:00 in a sonicator (below 30 °C )

steps.title: Transfer the solvent into a centrifuge...
steps.instruction: Transfer the solvent into a centrifuge tube and centrifugate for 00:10:00 at 4700 rpm

steps.title: Filter centrifuged solvent through annealed glass...
steps.instruction: Filter centrifuged solvent through annealed glass wool and evaporate with N 2

steps.title: Repeat step 2-5 two more times
steps.instruction: Repeat step 2-5 two more times

steps.title: Add small ball of anniled glass wool to column
steps.instruction: Add small ball of anniled glass wool to column

steps.title: Add 0
steps.instruction: Add 0.1 g of sand (50-70 mesh, previously fired at 450 °C during 10:00:00 ) to column

steps.title: Add 1 g of silica (70-230...
steps.instruction: Add 1 g of silica (70-230 mesh, previously fired at 450 °C during 10:00:00 ) to column

steps.title: Add lipids reconstituted in DCM with...
steps.instruction: Add lipids reconstituted in DCM with about 9 drops every 10 minutes

steps.title: Leave the column covered in aluminium...
steps.instruction: Leave the column covered in aluminium foil for at least 12 hours

steps.title: Calculate dead volume (DV) using n-hexane
steps.instruction: Calculate dead volume (DV) using n-hexane

steps.title: Elute n-alkanes with 3/8 DV using n-Hexane
steps.instruction: Elute n-alkanes with 3/8 DV using n-Hexane

steps.title: Elute aromatics with 2 DV 8/2 v:v n-hexane/DCM
steps.instruction: Elute aromatics with 2 DV 8/2 v:v n-hexane/DCM

steps.title: Elute ketones with 2 DV DCM
steps.instruction: Elute ketones with 2 DV DCM

steps.title: Elute alcohols with 2DV of 1/1 v:v DCM/Ethyl acetate
steps.instruction: Elute alcohols with 2DV of 1/1 v:v DCM/Ethyl acetate

steps.title: Elude acids and diols with 2 DV of Ethyl acetate
steps.instruction: Elude acids and diols with 2 DV of Ethyl acetate

steps.title: Elude other compounds with 2 DV of Methanol
steps.instruction: Elude other compounds with 2 DV of Methanol

steps.title: Evaporate all fractions using N 2 at 30 °C
steps.instruction: Evaporate all fractions using N 2 at 30 °C

steps.title: Store at -20 °C until measurement
steps.instruction: Store at -20 °C until measurement

steps.title: Reconstitute n-alkanes with 5α-androstane (8mg/L) and 150 µL of DCM
steps.instruction: Reconstitute n-alkanes with 5α-androstane (8mg/L) and 150 µL of DCM

steps.title: Reconstitute aromatics with 5α-androstane (8mg/L) and 50 µL of DCM
steps.instruction: Reconstitute aromatics with 5α-androstane (8mg/L) and 50 µL of DCM

steps.title: Reconstitute ketones with 5α-androstan-3-ol (8mg/L) and 50 µL of DCM
steps.instruction: Reconstitute ketones with 5α-androstan-3-ol (8mg/L) and 50 µL of DCM

steps.title: Reconstitute acids and diols with Methyl...
steps.instruction: Reconstitute acids and diols with Methyl C19:0 (8mg/L) and 40 µL of DCM and 10 µL of Ethyl acetate

steps.title: Reconstitute alcohols with 5α-androstan-3-ol (8mg/L) and...
steps.instruction: Reconstitute alcohols with 5α-androstan-3-ol (8mg/L) and 40 µL of DCM and 10 µL of Ethyl acetate

steps.title: Reconstitute other compounds with Methyl C19:0...
steps.instruction: Reconstitute other compounds with Methyl C19:0 (8mg/L) and 40 µL of DCM and 10 µL of Ethyl acetate

steps.title: Add 100 µL of N,O-Bis(trimethylsilyl)trifluoroacetamide (BSTFA)...
steps.instruction: Add 100 µL of N,O-Bis(trimethylsilyl)trifluoroacetamide (BSTFA) + trimethylchlorosilane (TCMS) 99:1 v/v and 100 µL of pyridine to the extract

steps.title: Derivatize at 80 °C for 01:00:00
steps.instruction: Derivatize at 80 °C for 01:00:00

steps.title: Dry the sample under N 2
steps.instruction: Dry the sample under N 2

steps.title: Derivatize fatty acids by adding 5...
steps.instruction: Derivatize fatty acids by adding 5 mL of MeOH, 400 µL of H 2 SO 4 to the extract

steps.title: Heat at 70 °C for 04:00:00
steps.instruction: Heat at 70 °C for 04:00:00

steps.title: Neutralize with saturated sodium bicarbonate solution
steps.instruction: Neutralize with saturated sodium bicarbonate solution

steps.title: Extract three times with 3 mL...
steps.instruction: Extract three times with 3 mL n-hexane and dry under nitrogen
